scripts.build:railway: pnpm run clean && RAILWAY_DISABLE_BUILD_CACHE=true pnpm install --frozen-lockfile --no-cache && pnpm run build
scripts.build:railway-debug: pnpm run clean && echo 'Railway build with full debugging' && pnpm install --frozen-lockfile --no-cache --loglevel=verbose && pnpm run build --verbose
scripts.railway:verify: echo 'Verifying Railway build artifacts...' && find packages/kam/dist -name '*.js' -type f && ls -la packages/kam/dist/auth/
